name: RCM TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
summary: RCM Technologies, Inc. is a provider of business and technology solutions delivering specialty healthcare, engineering, life sciences, data and solutions services. Operating through three segments—Specialty Health Care, Engineering, and Life Sciences Data & Solutions—the company offers staffing, teletherapy, engineering design, EPC services, IT infrastructure, application development, AI-driven automation, and enterprise business solutions to Fortune 1000 and mid-sized companies across North America and Europe.

products.name: Specialty Health Care Staffing
products.description: Staffing of nurses, therapists, paraprofessionals, physicians, and health information management professionals for healthcare institutions and school districts.

products.name: Teletherapy Services
products.description: Teletherapy targeting the education sector with emphasis on behavioral health services.

products.name: Engineering and Design Services
products.description: Engineering services across Energy Services, Process & Industrial, and Aerospace verticals including EPC and demand side management.

products.name: Life Sciences Data and Solutions
products.description: Enterprise business solutions, application development, IT infrastructure, data management, digitization, AI, and human capital management solutions.

products.name: Managed Service Offering
products.description: Industry-leading managed service collaborating with customers to foster quality improvements in a seamless, integrated function.
